title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: 389-ds-base bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for 389-ds-base is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: 389 Directory Server is an LDAP version 3 (LDAPv3) compliant server. The base packages include the Lightweight Directory Access Protocol (LDAP) server and command-line utilities for server administration.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): 389-ds-base-2.7.0-10.el9_7 updates dse.ldif with lowercase DNs causing ipa-healthcheck errors (JIRA:RHEL-153553)
affected_products: Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for Power, little endian
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for ARM 64

fixes.description: 389-ds-base-2.7.0-10.el9_7 updates dse.ldif with lowercase DNs causing ipa-healthcheck errors

full_text:
An update for 389-ds-base is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

389 Directory Server is an LDAP version 3 (LDAPv3) compliant server. The base packages include the Lightweight Directory Access Protocol (LDAP) server and command-line utilities for server administration.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): 389-ds-base-2.7.0-10.el9_7 updates dse.ldif with lowercase DNs causing ipa-healthcheck errors (JIRA:RHEL-153553)
